sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1075" key="a)/gxouros2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄγχουρος</orth> (B), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n1075.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gold</tr_>, from the name of the son of Midas, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.25.7</biblScope> </bibl> codd. (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Besant.</author> </bibl>), cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.306f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
